notes.primary_auth: OAuth 2.1 Bearer via Device Code flow — populated automatically by /agentstack-init (see hooks/scripts/device-code.mjs).
notes.fallback_auth_apikey: Manual fallback — replace headers.Authorization with 'X-API-Key': 'ask_...' from https://agentstack.tech/me/keys. See MCP_QUICKSTART.md.
notes.fallback_deeplink: For users without Node in PATH: cursor://anysphere.cursor-deeplink/mcp/install?name=agentstack&config=<base64-of-this-object>
notes.discovery: GET https://agentstack.tech/mcp/actions lists all ~80 capabilities. POST /mcp/cache/clear refreshes discovery.
notes.refresh: hooks/scripts/session-start.mjs rotates the Bearer ~2 minutes before expiry.
